description: 4 Pairs Kids Gloves, Magic Gloves, Stretchy Knitted Winter Warm Full Finger Set in Assorted Colours for Boys and Girls Flexible & Comfortable Fit: These stretchy kids gloves are crafted from a soft, thermal knitted fabric, offering a snug fit for various hand sizes. The kids gloves multipack is ideal for providing versatile options to match different outfits Effective Winter Warmth: The ribbed cuffs and close-knit construction help shield hands from chilly air, making these winter gloves effective for maintaining warmth during cooler weather, walks, or commuting Durable for Active Use: Made with resilient materials, these gloves for kids resist wear and tear, suiting activities like running, camping, or hiking. Their magic stretch quality ensures they retain shape and flexibility over time Easy Wear & Versatile Sizing: The magic gloves kids design allows for quick, effortless wearing. With a stretch-to-fit nature, they accommodate a range of sizes, functioning well as toddler gloves or for slightly older children during play and travel
